tags.documentation:
Direct Values from Modbus Register
1=Load on Other Module
2=Load Off
3=Load on Inverter
4=Load on Bypass
5=Load on Maintenance Bypass
6=Load on Battery
7=Load on Shared Source
tags.name: UPS_Output_Source_raw

tags.expression:

isGood({[.]Summary_Alarm_Reg_01}) && {[.]Summary_Alarm_Reg_01}=1 ||

tags.expression:
CASE({[.]UPS_Output_Source_raw},
1,"Normal", //Load on Other Module to graphical Normal value
2,"Unknown", //Load Off
3,"Normal", //Load on Inverter becomes graphical Normal value
4,"On Bypass", //Load on Bypass to graphical Load on Bypass value
5,"On Battery", //Load on Maint Bypass to graphical Load on Bypass value
6,"On Battery", //Load on Battery to graphical Load on Battery value
7,"Normal", //Load on Shared Source to graphical Normal value
"Unknown") //Else Unknown
tags.name: UPS_Output_Source
